#  Meet the team
Our team combines scientific, technical, business, and industrial expertise to develop scalable quantum networking solutions.
Founders
## The Pioneers of Quantum Networks
From groundbreaking research to real-world breakthroughs, meet the people turning bold ideas into reality.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b060b65a5f507afbf6f75_Tom%20Darras%2C%20PhD.jpg)](https://www.welinq.fr/team)

Investors
## Our Scientific Advisory Board
Guided by four pioneering experts in quantum information, Welinq is building next-generation quantum networking infrastructures to interconnect modular quantum processors. Their collective insights drive the development of scalable, fault-tolerant quantum networking solutions that will power the future of data centers.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682c4f586c3973877a08b2ca_Pr.%20Alain%20Aspect.jpg) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b0568238b40983b30a470_nobel-prize-medal.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b056a414dfb4f12109728_flag-france.png) ](https://www.welinq.fr/team)
Prof. Alain Aspect
  * Nobel Prize in Physics 2022


[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682c4f617db2811a3a8c4afd_Pr.%20Kae%20Nemoto.jpg) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b05431e497a5340d14401_aps-medal.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b0544de72fc300aacdebc_flag-japan.png) ](https://www.welinq.fr/team)
Prof. Kae Nemoto
  * Fellow of the American Physical Society


[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b050a7858b31ebc7f5a44_Pr.%20artur%20ekert.jpg) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b050e40e2a4701a276b12_micius-quantum-prize.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b050d754e88f20bc44b49_flag-uk.png) ](https://www.welinq.fr/team)
Prof. Artur Ekert
  * Micius Quantum Prize 2019
  * Fellow of the Royal Society


[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682c4f7e2ed2fcab9efde4a6_Pr.%20PETER%20ZOLLER.jpg) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b041d8b34ba513298ffee_wolf-prize.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67b49e83d42065e0fd07f054/682b03e786fa532a41bbed72_flag-austria.png) ](https://www.welinq.fr/team)
Prof. Peter Zoller
  * Wolf Prize for Physics 2013
  * John Stewart Bell Prize 2019


## Join us
Our team is united by a shared mission: building the future of quantum connectivity. Join the pioneers shaping tomorrow’s quantum networks.
Learn more
